title: Debug Options
description: Allows to change 25w37a debug options in-game
body:
Allows to change 25w37a debug options using new options section or command instead of launch parameters.
Most options can be found [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Debug_property).
![In-game options preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ffjDSVke/images/5fc89266d0b640f0ab2ba1bfda3475a38919878a.png)
